product: Genie Code now uses models served through OpenAI on Databricks ​
tagline: June 11, 2026 [Genie Code](/aws/en/genie code/) now uses models served through OpenAI on Databricks, in addition to models served through Azure OpenAI and Anthropic on Databricks, when [partner powere
what_it_does: June 11, 2026 [Genie Code](/aws/en/genie code/) now uses models served through OpenAI on Databricks, in addition to models served through Azure OpenAI and Anthropic on Databricks, when [partner powered AI features](/aws/en/databricks ai/partner powered) are enabled. For the model provider used by each feature, see [Partner powered AI features](/aws/en/databricks ai/partner powered).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
